---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest a new page, feature, or improvement for the wiki
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What's the idea?

A clear, concise description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## What problem does it solve / why is it useful?

Who benefits and in what situation? Is this filling a gap you noticed while
using the wiki, or a nice-to-have?

## Proposed solution

How do you imagine it working? Sketch the UX, list the pages/sections it would
touch, or describe the data it would surface.

## Alternatives considered

Any other ways to address the same need, and why this one is better.

## Examples / references

Links to other wikis, tools, or pages that do something similar (optional but
helpful).

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
